'''Kim Yeasson''' was the [[Junior Technician]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Reginard Base]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She supervised the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] technical crews and was a capable X-wing technician as well, often being found on the flight line repairing a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. She had roughly cut blonde hair and a greasy technician's work suit which gave her a rugged look. She was known to have had a relationship with [[Chief Technician]] [[Adonar Dellox]] which ended a month before his death. When his body was found, she had been repairing X-wing's on the flight line, though she soon arrived at the body. When [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Akimbo]] informed everyone to whom the body belonged, she rushed out of the room crying.
